'''gogajaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:laaarge|laaarge]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-g-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:laaarge|laaarge]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| gogajaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gogajithi|gogajithi]] || [[word:gogajiji|gogajiji]] || [[word:gogajishi|gogajishi]] || [[word:gogajiki|gogajiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gogajuthuthu|gogajuthuthu]] || [[word:gogajujuju|gogajujuju]] || [[word:gogajushushu|gogajushushu]] || [[word:gogajukuku|gogajukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gogajuthu|gogajuthu]] || [[word:gogajuju|gogajuju]] || [[word:gogajushu|gogajushu]] || [[word:gogajuku|gogajuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gogajufthuf|gogajufthuf]] || [[word:gogajufjuf|gogajufjuf]] || [[word:gogajufshuf|gogajufshuf]] || [[word:gogajufkuf|gogajufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gogajethe|gogajethe]] || [[word:gogajeje|gogajeje]] || [[word:gogajeshe|gogajeshe]] || [[word:gogajeke|gogajeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gogajothotho|gogajothotho]] || [[word:gogajojojo|gogajojojo]] || [[word:gogajoshosho|gogajoshosho]] || [[word:gogajokoko|gogajokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gogajotho|gogajotho]] || [[word:gogajojo|gogajojo]] || [[word:gogajosho|gogajosho]] || [[word:gogajoko|gogajoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gogajofthof|gogajofthof]] || [[word:gogajofjof|gogajofjof]] || [[word:gogajofshof|gogajofshof]] || [[word:gogajofkof|gogajofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:gogajÃŸfthÃŸf|gogajÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:gogajÃŸfjÃŸf|gogajÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:gogajÃŸfshÃŸf|gogajÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:gogajÃŸfkÃŸf|gogajÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:gogajÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|gogajÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:gogajÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|gogajÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:gogajÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|gogajÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:gogajÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|gogajÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:gogajÃŸfthÃŸf|gogajÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:gogajÃŸfjÃŸf|gogajÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:gogajÃŸfshÃŸf|gogajÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:gogajÃŸfkÃŸf|gogajÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:gogajÃŸfthÃŸf|gogajÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:gogajÃŸfjÃŸf|gogajÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:gogajÃŸfshÃŸf|gogajÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:gogajÃŸfkÃŸf|gogajÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gogajÃḊthÃḊ|gogajÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:gogajÃḊjÃḊ|gogajÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:gogajÃḊshÃḊ|gogajÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:gogajÃḊkÃḊ|gogajÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gogajathatha|gogajathatha]] || [[word:gogajajaja|gogajajaja]] || [[word:gogajashasha|gogajashasha]] || [[word:gogajakaka|gogajakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gogajatha|gogajatha]] || [[word:gogajaja|gogajaja]] || [[word:gogajasha|gogajasha]] || [[word:gogajaka|gogajaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gogajafthaf|gogajafthaf]] || [[word:gogajafjaf|gogajafjaf]] || [[word:gogajafshaf|gogajafshaf]] || [[word:gogajafkaf|gogajafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:gogajasha|gogajasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:gogajshÃḋsha|gogajshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogajrosha|gogajrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gogajmusha|gogajmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:gogajyasha|gogajyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogogajnkshÃḋsha|gogogajnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogogajnkrosha|gogogajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogogajnkmusha|gogogajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogogajnkyasha|gogogajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:gogagajasha|gogagajasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gogagajshÃḋsha|gogagajshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogagajrosha|gogagajrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gogagajmusha|gogagajmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gogagajyasha|gogagajyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogogagajnkshÃḋsha|gogogagajnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogogagajnkrosha|gogogagajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogogagajnkmusha|gogogagajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogogagajnkyasha|gogogagajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:gegÃḊjasha|gegÃḊjasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gegÃḊjshÃḋsha|gegÃḊjshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gegÃḊjrosha|gegÃḊjrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gegÃḊjmusha|gegÃḊjmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gegÃḊjyasha|gegÃḊjyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogegÃḊjnkshÃḋsha|gogegÃḊjnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogegÃḊjnkrosha|gogegÃḊjnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogegÃḊjnkmusha|gogegÃḊjnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogegÃḊjnkyasha|gogegÃḊjnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:gogfajasha|gogfajasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gogfajshÃḋsha|gogfajshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogfajrosha|gogfajrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gogfajmusha|gogfajmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gogfajyasha|gogfajyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogogfajnkshÃḋsha|gogogfajnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogogfajnkrosha|gogogfajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogogfajnkmusha|gogogfajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogogfajnkyasha|gogogfajnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
